awards.title: Archery Federal Judge
description: Earned **national** judge certification, qualifying to officiate archery competitions at the national level
Required strong **knowledge** of the rulebook, fast **decision making** and awareness of the **safety** measure to ensure **smooth**, **fair** and **safe** competitions for everyone

awards.title: GCP Professional Cloud Architect
description: Validated my knowledge on **Google Cloud Platform** by taking the official exam

awards.title: Pastry Chef Degree
description: Passed the national exam as **independent candidate** to become a **professional pastry chef** after one year of online courses

awards.title: Hackathon: Mobility (1st prize)
description: Developed in three days a **proactive agent** to notify clients about delay or removal of their trains, and push alternatives to ensure **client satisfaction** (ex. other routes, reduction to carpooling services)

awards.title: AWS Solution Architect
description: Used the certification as a goal to **learn** and **improve** my efficiency with the **AWS** cloud provider

awards.title: Hackathon: Women Innovation (1st prize)
description: Developed in two days a solution to **help women** to fight back **against sexism** in professional environment
Spent **one year** as **volunteer** in “365 raiponce” association as main **backend** and **infrastructure** engineer
